verses.text: “ Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua hun ciangin kei pen Israel mi khempeuhte' Pasian ka hi ding a, amaute pen keima mite ahi ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Topa in hong genin-ah: “Namsau tawh thahna a thuaklote in gamlakah hehpihna a mu ding uh hi. Israel mite in tawldamna ding a zon' laitakun
gamlapi pek panin Topa ka kilang hi. Keimah in nang kong it tawntung a, tua ahih manin nang' tungah kong thuman tawntung hi
Aw, nungak siangtho Israel aw, nang kong bawlpha kik ding hi. Na khuangte na man kik ding a, a gualnuamte' lamna-ah na va kihel ding hi
Samaria gam mualtung tengah leenggah na suankik ding a, huan bawlte in suanin a gah ne-in nuam a sa ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Efraim mualtung panin galvilte in, ‘Tho un! Topa i Pasian kiang Zion khua-ah va pai ni,’ ci-in a hong kiko hun uh hong tung ding hi,” hong ci hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, “Jakob-a' dingin lungdamna tawh ngaih takin la sa un la, gam khempeuh lakah gam lian pen-a' dingin kiko-in awng un. ‘ Topa in Israel mi a omlaite, ama mite hong honkhia khinzo hi,’ ci-in taangko un la phat un

En un, keimah in leilu lam gam panin amaute ka la ding a, leitung a gamla pen mun panin ka kaikhawm ding hi. Mittawte leh khebaite zong hong kihel ding uh a, nupi gaite leh nausuak ding numeite-a kipan hih lai munah mihonpi hong ciahkik ding uh hi

Amaute a kap kawmin hong pai ding uh a, keimah in hehnemin amaute ka pii kik ding hi. Tui omna lui gei-ah amaute ka paipihkik ding a, lam nuamah paipihin a tuk kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite' pa ka hi a, Efraim, ka ta upa pen ahi hi

“Aw, gamdangte aw, Topa' kammal ngai un la, gamlapi, tuipi gei-a omte kiangah va gensawn un. ‘Israel mite a kithehthang sakpa in kaikhawm kik ding a, tuucingpa in a tuute a kep bangin a kem ding hi,’ va ci un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Jakob ka suaktasak khinzo a, a zawh zawhloh khutte' sung pan ka honkhiazo hi

Amaute hong pai-in Zion mual tungah ngaihtakin la sa ding uh a, Topa' hehpihna ahi, buh, leenggahzu, sathau leh tuuno, bawngnote' hangin amaute a lungdam mahmah ding uh hi. A nuntakna uh, tui a kibuak huan bang ding a, lungkham nawnlo ding uh hi
Tua ciangin nungakte lamin lungdam ding uh a, tangvalte leh papite zong nuam ding uh hi. Amau' kahnate lungdamna ka suaksak ding a, amaute hehpihin a dahnate uh kipahna ka suaksak ding hi
An lim pen tawh siampite ka vak ding a, keima hoihna hangin ka mite a lungkim ding uh hi, Topa in ka ci hi,” a ci hi
Topa in kong cihin-ah: “Ramah khua-ah aw khat kiza a, tauna leh kah ngutngutna awging ahi hi. Rachel, a tate-a' dingin a kap hi. A tate om nawnlo ahih manin kinem zolo hi,” a ci hi
Topa in kong cihin-ah: “Kap nawn kei un la, na khitui uh nul un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, na nasep thaman uh na ngah uh hi. Amaute galte' gam panin hong ciahkik ding uh hi
Na mailam uh-a' dingin lametna a om hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Na tate uh zong na gam mah uhah hong ciahkik ding uh hi
Efraim' kahna aw ka zazo a, ‘ Topa aw, bawngtal sinloh bangin kei nong thuhilh khinzo hi. Kong ciahkik theihna dingin hong lakik in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen Topa ka Pasian na hi hi
Nangma kiang panin ka paikhiat khit phetin ka kisikkik a, nong thuhilh khit ciangin dahin ka kun hi. Ka neu laitaka ka minsiatna teng pua niloh ka hih manin maizumin ka lung-am hi,’ a ci hi

“Efraim, ka it ka tapa hilo ahi hiam? Amah keima ngaihno hilo ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ama thu ka gen simin amah ka phawk lailai hi. Tua ahih manin amah ka ngaihsun tawntung a, ka hehpih taktak ding hi, Topa in ka ci hi
Lampi-ah ciamtehnate bawl un la, lamlahnate phut un. Na paikhiatna uh lampi mah limtakin zongkik un. Nungak siangtho tawh a kibang Israel mite aw, hong kilehkik un la, na khuapite uh hong zuankik un
Bang tanvei lungka ding na hi hiam, a zulhzau ka tanu aw. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in leitungah na thak khat bawl a, numei in pasal a honzo hi,” a ci hi

Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in hong genin-ah: “Keimah in amaute a gam uhah ka omsak kik ciangin, Judah gam leh a khuapite uhah amaute in, ‘Thuman thutak a ten'na mual siangtho aw, Topa in thupha hong pia ta hen,’ ci-in a genkik leuleu ding uh hi
Judah gam leh a khuapite sungah lokhote leh tuu cinga a vak kawikawi mite a tengkhawm ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a gim mite ka tawldamsak ding a, gilkialin a thazawm mite khempeuh an ka vak kham ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua khit ciangin ka khanglo a, ka khuadak hi. Ka khan'lawh nuam ka sa mahmah hi.
Topa in kong cihin-ah, “Israel gam leh Judah gam, mihing leh ganhing tawh ka dimsak hun hong tung ding hi

Amaute a kibetkhiatna ding leh a kitapzanna ding ahi zongin, a kisuankhiatna ding leh a kisiatna ding ahi zongin ka vaihawm mah bangin, Topa in ka cihin-ah, amaute a kilamna ding leh a kiphuhna dingin ka vaihawm ding hi
Tua ni ciangin amaute in: “ ‘Pate in leenggah thuk ne uh a, a tate uh' ha a kim hi,’ a kici paunak a zang nawn kei ding uh hi
Mi khempeuh amau' mawhna ciat uh hang bekin a si ding uh hi. Leenggah thuk a nete' ha bek a kim ding hi
“En un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Israel minamte leh Judah minamte tawh thuciamna thak khat ka bawl ni hun hong tung ding hi

Tua pen, a pu a pate uh, Egypt gam panin ka lakkhiatna dingin a khut uh tawh ka kaihkhiat huna ka bawl uh thuciamna tawh kibanglo ding hi. Tua hun lai-in kei amaute' pasal hinapi-in ka thuciamna a hong palsat uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi

Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua hun hong tun' ciangin Israel minamte tawh hih bangin thuciamna ka bawl ding hi: Amaute' sungah ka thukham ka koih ding a, amaute' lungtang tungah ka gelh ding hi. Kei pen amaute' Pasian ka hi ding a, amaute pen keima mite ahi ding uh hi

Kuamah in midangte leh a sanggamte uh kiangah, ‘ Topa thei in,’ ci-in a kihilh nawn kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, amaute in a neupen panin a lianpen dongin, a vekpi-un kei a hong thei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau' khialhnate ka maisak ding a, amaute' mawhnate zong phawkin ka nei nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa in sun-a khuavak dingin ni hong pia a, zan-a khuavak dingin a kikhel ngeilo kha leh aksite hong pia hi. Tuipi a lawh ciangin tuihualte ging zuazua a, ama min pen Vanglian Topa kici hi
Amah in, “ Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih a kip mahmah leitung leh vantung ngeinate a kikhel hun ciang bekin, Israel mite' suanlekhakte in gam neiloin a om pan bek ding uh hi,” a ci hi

Topa in hong genin-ah, “Vantung a kiteh theih ciang leh leinuai-a leitung bulpite a kivel theih ciang bekin Israel-te' suanlekhakte khempeuh a mawhna uh hangin ka lawnkhiamang pan ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a ci hi
Topa in kong cihin-ah, “Hananel Tausangpi panin khuakulh Kiu Kongpi dongin khuapi a kibawphat hun hong tung ding hi
Tua lai panin khuapi huang dingin nitumna lamah Gareb mual dong kiteh suak ding a, Goah lamah a kihei ding hi

Misi luanghawmte leh vutte a kibuakna kuam buppi leh Kidron lui phak ma-a loteng khempeuh tawh, tua panin nisuahna lama Sakol Kongpi kiu ciangdong, Topa-a' dingin mun siangtho a suak ding hi. Cikmah ciangin tua khuapi kisusia nawnlo ding a, a kisuankhia ngei nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi.
